name: Banshee
description: Classic high-speed sports car. Fast but can be tricky to handle.
tips: Best for highway racing. Not great off-road.

name: Coquette
description: Sleek American muscle-inspired sports car. Better handling than the Banshee.
tips: All-around best sports car for street racing — balances speed and control.

name: Patriot
description: Rugged military-style SUV. Slow but nearly indestructible.
acquisition: Found at military bases or purchased.
tips: Great for ramming through police blockades.

name: Sanchez
description: Lightweight off-road dirt bike. Excellent for rough terrain.
acquisition: Purchased from Southern San Andreas Super Autos.
tips: Best vehicle for off-road exploration and stunt jumps.

name: Maverick
description: Standard civilian helicopter. Easy to fly and widely available.
acquisition: Purchased from Elitas Travel or found at helipads.
tips: Best way to traverse the map quickly. Land on rooftops to find hidden collectibles.

name: Squalo
description: Sleek offshore speedboat. Fast and nimble on open water.
tips: Essential for ocean escapes and island-hopping — Vice City has a massive coastline.
